response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title "dahlah." via on-screen lyrics and confirmed performer as Anya Melfissa.
2. Performed web search for "Kaela Kovalskia dahlah. lyrics".
3. Identified the original artist as Kaela Kovalskia.
4. Segregated the video into three parts: two musical segments (background and performance) and one dialogue segment.
5. Extracted the Indonesian lyrics and provided a direct English translation for the corresponding parts.
response.global_summary: A music video featuring a performance of the song "dahlah." by Kaela Kovalskia, covered by VTuber Anya Melfissa. The video includes a dialogue-only skit in the middle, splitting the musical content into two segments.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs actions in a room, with the song "dahlah." playing in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Dahlah saja) (Jalani saja)
Bukannya sudah biasa? (Biasa)
Ditikam oleh kecewa (Kecewa)
Saat dunia tak berjalan semestinya
Oh, oh
Mungkin sudahlah saatnya (Saatnya)
Kau coba lepaskan saja (Lepaskan saja)
Tak perlu tanya mengapa lagi.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Just let it go) (Just live it)
Isn't it usual? (Usual)
Stabbed by disappointment (Disappointment)
When the world doesn't go as it should
Oh, oh
Maybe it's time (It's time)
You try to just let it go (Just let it go)
No need to ask why anymore.

scenes.description: Dialogue-only segment where Anya Melfissa speaks in front of a microphone.
A musical performance of "dahlah." with animated paper cutouts of various Hololive ID members acting as the band.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Dahlah saja) (Jalani saja)
Jika memang jawaban tak kau dapatkan
Jangan tangisi, coba lalui teka-tekinya
Relakanlah, karena pada akhirnya
Kau lebih kuat daripada yang kau kira.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Just let it go) (Just live it)
If you really can't find the answer
Don't cry, try to go through the puzzle
Let it go, because in the end
You are stronger than you think.
